summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TopBass handyman service marketplace with new Teen Pacific Academic theme. All major features working correctly including homepage, search, authentication, admin dashboard, and registration.
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (100% success rate - 12/12 tests passed)
Homepage loads with Teen Pacific Academic theme (navy blue hero, coral buttons)
Services grid displays all 20 categories correctly
Search functionality works (search input, results display, clear search)
District filter functionality (Colombo selection, nearby handymen display)
Login flow with admin@bassbass.lk / admin123 credentials
Register page loads with proper form elements and role selection
Language switcher component present in navigation
Navigation elements working (Home, About, My Bookings, Chat, Admin)
Theme colors properly implemented (Sunset Coral #F05A4A for buttons)
Responsive design and proper UI layout
